name: Lakeside Glimpse
descriptionTemplate: Inflict [Arg2] {Poison} on the highest HP enemy, and gain [Block:Arg1] Shield. If {Devour} has been triggered this turn, trigger half of that enemy's {Poison} instead of gaining Shield.
lore:
The lake in Cambrian Valley shimmers with crystal-clear waters.

The clamor of the maze gradually fades away, leaving only you and the newly freed girl to savor this tranquil moment.
